meta.title: Register | AI Game Connect
meta.description: Register interest as a Founding Player or Founding Venue Partner for the AI Game Connect preview community.

hero.title: Join AI Game Connect.
hero.body: Choose your early access path and tell us what you want to play, host, track, or receive updates about.

visualCards.title: Register as Player
visualCards.body: Register now as a Founding Player and get priority invites once matches launch in your area.

visualCards.title: Register Your Venue
visualCards.body: Founding Venue Partners get preferred visibility and early access to pricing before public launch.

sections.title: Start with the role that fits you today.
sections.body: Both paths are preview-only and free to register. No account, payment, or stored submission is created on this static website.

items.title: Player path
items.body: Tell us what you want to play, where you are available, and which ranking or reward updates matter to you.

items.title: Venue path
items.body: Share your venue details, activity capacity, hosting potential, and safety agreement for future review.

sections.title: Player and venue registration previews.
sections.body: These forms do not store data in this static website. They show the questionnaire structure to connect to an external form before launch.

sections.title: Every registration path follows the same safety standards.
sections.body: The ecosystem is designed for healthy real-life competition in approved places only.
items: Approved venues, fields, and courts only

sections.title: Is AI Game Connect free?
sections.body: Free to register and join the early player community. Venue costs, paid competitions, or future premium features will always be shown clearly before confirmation. Venue pricing will be shared after registration and review.

sections.title: Preview forms only.
sections.body: Thanks. This is a preview form. Connect an external form before launch. This static website does not store form data in a custom backend, localStorage, cookies, files, or a database. If external forms are later connected, submissions may be stored by the selected form provider.
